title: Spears
description: A recreation of the upcoming Spears for Minecraft!
body:
# Spears!

Minecraft's new spears are gonna take a while to come out, so I've made a quick and dirty recreation based on the livestream! Thanks to MrVirus for commissioning!

The new spears can be charged with right click and will deal damage based on horizontal speed!![Crafting recipe for the iron spear!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d00c6cab727a18e007e87b731424516017a4e76a.png)
